title: Explainable machine-learning tools for predictive maintenance of circulating water systems in nuclear power plants
snippet: Explainable ML tools applied to predictive maintenance of circulating water systems in nuclear power plants, addressing the explainability gap that limits adoption.

title: Explainable machine-learning tools for predictive maintenance of circulating water systems in nuclear power plants
snippet: DOE OSTI record of the same explainable-ML predictive maintenance study, indexed as a journal article.

title: Nuclear Predictive Maintenance: AI & Machine Learning for Reactor Equipment
snippet: Industry overview of AI/ML techniques (CNNs, RNNs, reinforcement learning) applied to equipment health prediction and failure-mode classification in nuclear plants.

title: The use of Artificial Intelligence in the nuclear sector
snippet: Sector overview noting AI adoption for predictive maintenance is still early-stage but shows strong cost-saving potential.

title: A novel inspection robot for nuclear station steam generator secondary side with self-localization
snippet: Climbing robot with onboard cameras and self-localization for inspecting steam generator secondary-side tubes without direct human access.

title: The SG-Climbot: An Adaptable, Efficient, Inspection and Repair Robot for Steam Generator Heat Transfer Tube Sheet
snippet: 2025 paper on an adaptable robot for inspecting and repairing steam generator heat-transfer tube sheets.

title: An Inspection Planning Method for Steam Generators with Triangular-Distributed Tubes
snippet: Task- and path-planning method for robots inspecting the thousands of tubes inside a steam generator.

title: High-efficiency inspecting method for mobile robots based on task planning for heat transfer tubes in a steam generator
snippet: Task-planning approach to improve efficiency of mobile robot inspection of steam generator heat-transfer tubes.

title: A nuclear power plant digital twin for developing robot navigation and interaction
snippet: Simulation-based digital twin environment built specifically to develop and test robot navigation/interaction in nuclear plants, since testing on physical plants is restricted for safety reasons.

title: iFANnpp: Nuclear Power Plant Digital Twin for Robots and Autonomous Intelligence
snippet: Open digital-twin framework for nuclear power plants aimed at supporting robotics and autonomous-intelligence research.

title: Digital Twins for Nuclear Power Plants and Facilities
snippet: ORNL publication on digital twin applications across the nuclear plant lifecycle: design, licensing, operations, maintenance, and decommissioning.

title: Digital Twin-Centered Hybrid Data-Driven Multi-Stage Deep Learning Framework for Enhanced Nuclear Reactor Power Prediction
snippet: Deep-learning framework combining physics models and data-driven methods for nuclear reactor power prediction within a digital-twin architecture.

title: Digital Twins | Nuclear Regulatory Commission
snippet: U.S. regulator's own page on digital twins, noting a research partnership with Idaho National Laboratory and Oak Ridge National Laboratory to assess regulatory viability.

title: Qualification pathways for additively manufactured components for nuclear applications
snippet: Evaluates qualification pathways for 316L stainless steel components made by laser powder bed fusion, including hot isostatic pressing (HIP) treatment to reduce property scatter.

title: NUCOBAM European project: NUclear COmponents based on additive manufacturing
snippet: 13-organization, 6-country European project developing qualification/evaluation processes for 3D-printed nuclear power plant components.

title: Embracing the Promise of Additive Manufacturing for Advanced Nuclear Reactors
snippet: IAEA overview of additive manufacturing's potential for advanced reactor components and the qualification challenges still to be solved.

title: Advanced Manufacturing and Materials Qualification for Nuclear Reactors
snippet: EPRI research program on advanced manufacturing and materials qualification, including additive manufacturing, for the nuclear fleet.

title: There are now 127 different SMR designs, finds NEA report
snippet: Coverage of the OECD NEA's SMR Dashboard third edition, reporting 127 tracked SMR designs globally and 74 analyzed in depth.

title: The NEA Small Modular Reactor Dashboard: Third Edition
snippet: Official NEA dashboard report: 51 SMR designs in pre-licensing/licensing, 85 active siting discussions, data as of Feb 2025.

title: Deployment of small modular reactors: A strategic roadmap validated by expert consensus
snippet: Expert-consensus roadmap for SMR deployment strategy, covering technical, regulatory, and market factors.

title: Small Modular Reactors: A Realist Approach to the Future of Nuclear Power
snippet: Policy report assessing realistic timelines, cost trajectories, and deployment barriers for SMRs.

title: Deep Geologic Repositories
snippet: Canadian regulator's educational overview of deep geological repository concepts and Canada's program.

title: Deep geologic repository progress — 2025 Update
snippet: 2025 industry update on global deep geological repository program progress, including Canada's site-selection milestone.

title: Deep geological repositories — A review of design concepts, near-field evolution, and their implications for nuclear waste containment
snippet: Technical review of repository design concepts and near-field barrier evolution (e.g., bentonite, canister corrosion) relevant to long-term containment performance.

title: Next-generation nuclear waste management: Geological repositories, emerging technologies, and global pathways
snippet: Survey of emerging waste-management technologies and global deployment pathways beyond first-generation repository designs.

title: Fusion Energy: No Longer '30 Years Away'?
snippet: Market-research overview citing roughly 50 private fusion companies and multi-billion-dollar private investment advancing burning-plasma demonstrations.

title: Energy Department Announces Fusion Science and Technology Roadmap to Accelerate Commercial Fusion Power
snippet: DOE roadmap targeting commercial fusion power delivery to the grid by the mid-2030s.

title: Toward Commercial Fusion Energy: Considerations for Congress
snippet: US policy-focused overview of technical and regulatory considerations for commercial fusion energy.

title: Fusion energy commercialization requires solving social and environmental challenges
snippet: Academic paper arguing that social and environmental challenges, not just plasma physics, will determine fusion's commercialization timeline.

title: Lutetium-177, The Increasing Production Of A Promising Radioisotope
snippet: Overview of growing global Lu-177 production capacity for cancer-therapy radiopharmaceuticals.

title: Multiple Production Methods Underway to Provide Actinium-225
snippet: US federal overview of multiple parallel production routes (including the DOE Tri-Lab accelerator effort) being pursued to scale up Ac-225 supply.

title: Challenges and future options for the production of lutetium-177
publisher: European Journal of Nuclear Medicine and Molecular Imaging (Springer)
snippet: Peer-reviewed review of reactor-based Lu-177 production routes and future supply options.

snippet: Industry reporting on the Ac-225 supply race, including the ITM/Canadian Nuclear Laboratories 'Actineer' joint venture.

title: Securing medical radioisotopes supply: NEA hosts second international workshop
snippet: NEA workshop coverage on international efforts to secure and monitor medical radioisotope supply chains.
